prompt_template.system: You are forecasting whether the target stock's next trading-day movement is Rise or Fall using the provided 5-day aligned history of tweets and historical prices. Return only a JSON object with exactly one key, label, whose value is either Rise or Fall.
prompt_template.user: Rendered by scripts/tasks/stocknet_acl18_stockmove_v0/render_prompt.py from the structured aligned_days field.

components.name: format_reward
components.description: Valid JSON object with exactly one accepted key.

components.name: exact_match_reward
components.description: Reward exact label match against the canonical gold label.

components.name: malformed_output_penalty
components.description: Penalty for malformed or invalid outputs.

notes: Reward utilities for StockNet ACL18 are non-canonical and intended only for local offline experimentation.
Benchmark-authoritative comparison uses the cached evaluator variants with accuracy and MCC, not the reward totals in parse_reward.py.

publication.reason: Published in the normal ST312 artifact layout with a small source-terms caution because the upstream repository is MIT-licensed but the corpus contains tweet-derived content and Yahoo Finance price data.
